title: Unrefined Syrian Lentil Soup
description: A light, sweet, and snappy Syrian lentil soup that uses brown lentils and a whisk to create a silky texture, completely egg‑free.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion, carrot, and minced garlic, sautéing until the onion becomes translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste and cook for 1 minute to bloom the flavors.
Add rinsed lentils, vegetable broth, and water; bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 25 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
Use a whisk to gently blend a portion of the soup into a slurry and stir back in to achieve a silky texture.
Stir in lemon juice, dried mint, salt, and black pepper.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed; simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Ladle the soup into bowls and serve hot.
